method_note: 3x3x3 neighborhood around target_exposure_pct=0.6, min_hold_days=40, score_buffer=0.05; trend_window=60 and momentum_window=20 fixed; slippage 0 bps and 20 bps; session-fixed execution.

hard_gates: 0 bps max drawdown no worse than equal-weight fixed 60%
comparison_gate.stability_warning_gate: 20 bps 504-session rolling windows should not be negative

cio_interpretation.summary: v1b low-turnover neighborhood is not a single-point artifact, but rolling 504-session and yearly stability fail under 20 bps. Keep research-only and investigate 2021-2023 regime weakness before any paper discussion.
cio_interpretation.next_action: research-only regime stability review; no QMT, no real money, no parameter recommendation
